Package io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project

package io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project
  • Class
    Description
    Cat
    Manages the location of the cat on the screen, its lives, score, and whether it has its shield
    Cat.State
    Represents the cat's current visual/action state.
    Dollar
    Helper class from the $1 gesture recognizer library.
    DollarListener
    Helper class from the $1 gesture recognizer library.
    EndScreen
    The screen that a player sees after they either win or lose the game
    GameEngine
    Manages the player's current level and handles level progression
    GameScreen
    The class that manages the graphics on the screen during the game
    Ghost
    The ghost class, that manages each individual ghost/moving sprite with shapes in the screen
    Ghostturn
    Represents a wave of ghosts during a level
    HomeScreen
    Displays the screen that a player sees first with the big center play button
    Level
    Represents a singular Level in the game, managing the ghostTurns in the level
    LevelSetup
    Sets up the levels with all their ghostTurns
    Main
    Main game class that loads shared assets, creates the viewport and stage, starts the background music, and opens the home screen.
    Point
    The point class used for recognizing shapes
    Recognizer
    Recognizes drawn gestures by comparing the player's stroke to a set of shape templates.
    Rectangle
    Helper class from the $1 gesture recognizer library.
    Result
    Helper class from the $1 gesture recognizer library.
    Template
    Helper class from the $1 gesture recognizer library.
    TemplateData
    Helper class from the $1 gesture recognizer library.
    TouchListener
    Helper class from the $1 gesture recognizer library.
    Trigonometric
    Helper class from the $1 gesture recognizer library.
    Utils
    Helper class from the $1 gesture recognizer library.
